investigation_summary: 2013 payment card breach — 40M cards; $18.5M multistate AG settlement; major Visa settlement. 2023 Pride merch pullback under conservative pressure — brand & employee backlash. Otherwise above-average retail pay ($15–24), CDP A-, fewer severe labor cases vs peers.

profile.legal_summary: Historic breach; episodic EEOC store settlements; Pride removal litigation chatter.
profile.labor_summary: Better than Walmart/DG; no union headline cases in seed.
profile.product_health: General merchandise + grocery — standard retail quality variance.
profile.executive_summary: Brian Cornell CEO era — supply-chain modernization.
